description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun featuring a long, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, giving it an elongated profile. The frame and slide are finished in a striking two-tone pattern of black and light gray, with abstract, angular designs and a stylized animal graphic on the slide. The grip is robust and ergonomically contoured, with a solid black color and subtle texturing for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. The suppressor is smooth and matches the color scheme of the rest of the firearm, seamlessly integrated with the barrel. The overall design is sleek and tactical, with minimal external markings aside from the decorative elements.
description: A sleek, two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a long suppressor, abstract patterns, and a stylized animal graphic on the slide. The grip is contoured and black, while the overall design is modern and tactical.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the symmetrical alignment of the barrel.
description_view_1: A left-side profile view reveals the full length of the suppressor, the abstract black and gray pattern, and a prominent animal graphic on the slide above the grip.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the slide and grip, with the suppressor extending forward and minimal visible detail except for the symmetry of the frame.
description_view_3: The right-side profile displays the length of the suppressor and the grip, with the abstract pattern continuing but without the animal graphic seen on the left side.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and contoured for ergonomic handling, finished in solid black with a subtle matte texture. It features gentle finger grooves for improved comfort and control, and the surface appears to have a fine stippling or light checkering for enhanced grip. The backstrap is slightly arched, and the overall shape is squared at the base. There is a stylized animal graphic above the grip on the slide, but no visible logos or embellishments on the grip itself.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the curvature is gentle without any squared-off edges or undercuts. The design is simple and functional, blending seamlessly with the frame.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is extended and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, giving it a long, streamlined profile. The suppressor is smooth, matching the handgun's two-tone color scheme, and there are no visible ports, fluting, or external markings on the barrel or suppressor exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a prominent stylized animal graphic on the left side, integrated into the abstract black and gray pattern. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations. The decorative pattern is bold and visually striking, covering much of the slide's surface.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and squared, with a slight bevel at the edges for easier insertion and removal. It is finished in solid black, matching the grip, and does not feature any finger rests, logos, or additional texturing. The design is minimalistic and functional.
